case_number: misc. application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.S-1185 of 2023 Date Orders with Signatures of Judges Hearing/Priority. 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply, flagged A 2. For hearing of MA No.8698/2023 (O 39 R 1&2) 3. For hearing of main case. 28.04.2025. Mr. Mirza Moeez Baig, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Heer Memon, Advocate for Respondents No.2 Mr. Syed Muhammad Abdul Kabeer, Advocate for Respondents No.3 and 4 Ms. Amna Ansari, APG, Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Javed, AAG alongwith SIP Zulfiqar of Gizri PS Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition as during its pendency the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court. Learned counsel for the Respondents affirm the above position. Accordingly, this petition alongwith pending misc. application is dismissed as not pressed. Judge
